learningQualityStandards.label: Contrastive normal-to-abnormal encoding
learningQualityStandards.requirement: Add a normal/reactive comparator plus one high-yield mimic discriminator.

learningQualityStandards.label: Retrieval before explanation
learningQualityStandards.requirement: Attach a faculty-reviewed answer key for diagnosis, required feature, mimic, and report consequence prompts.

learningQualityStandards.label: Spaced consolidation
learningQualityStandards.requirement: Preserve same-session, 1 day, 3 day, 7 day, and 21 day review prompts with escalating autonomy.

learningQualityStandards.label: Dual coding without image over-reliance
learningQualityStandards.requirement: Pair each visual anchor with low-power, high-power, and report-consequence inspection tasks.

learningQualityStandards.label: Faculty-calibrated safety
learningQualityStandards.requirement: Complete provenance, reviewer, citation, asset/license, safety pitfall, and last-reviewed metadata.
